prompts.title: Analyse pedagogic visual opportunities
prompts.body:
Context:
You receive complete Utilities-rendered learner HTML (or a stable HTML export from the Design Page / Utilities path).

Task:
Analyse the DOM and instructional flow. Emit a JSON artefact listing tiered visual opportunities (essential / valuable / optional / decorative-rejected) aligned to Sprint 32 charter tiers.

Instructions:
- Do not rewrite instructional prose or change pedagogy.
- Reference existing activity titles, materials, tables, and tasks by DOM anchor (class names, section headings).
- For each opportunity include: anchor_description, suggested_figure_type, tier, pedagogic_justification, placement_hint (which preferred slot from the embed-step contract applies).
- Placement hints must respect Sprint 31 order: header → framing → task → materials → assessment.
- Never recommend inserting figures inside .util-activity-header, .util-badge-row, headings, .util-icon-heading, or .util-section-heading.
- Prefer slots: after .util-activity-header; after .util-activity-framing; inside .util-activity-materials when tied to a worksheet/table; between util-table-scroll blocks when comparing data.
- Reject decorative stock imagery and hero banners.
- Output JSON only, no commentary outside the JSON object.
prompts.notes: Sprint 32 analysis step; placement hints align with embed prompt v1.1.1.

prompts.title: Generate pedagogic figure images
prompts.body:
Context:
You receive the visual opportunity JSON from the prior analysis step and any author constraints.

Task:
Produce image generation briefs (and invoke the configured image output path) for opportunities at essential or valuable tier only.

Instructions:
- One brief per approved figure; include alt-text draft and caption draft.
- Educational diagram style: labelled, calm, high contrast, no stock photography.
- Do not pass image bytes or base64 through this prompt — file artefacts only.
- Skip decorative-rejected and optional tier unless the author explicitly requests optional figures.
- Map each image artefact to the opportunity anchor_id for the embed step.
prompts.notes: Generation step; artefact handoff to embed step.

prompts.title: Embed pedagogic figures into learner HTML
prompts.body: Context: You receive Utilities-rendered learner HTML (complete document or stable body fragment) and one or more pedagogic image artefacts (files or refs with alt text and caption metadata). You may also receive the visual opportunity JSON and generation briefs from upstream steps. Task: Insert accessible
prompts.notes: v1.1.1: fixes header-insertion bug (climate enhanced page).

workflows.name: Visual Enhancement Utility v1.1.1
workflows.description: Augments Utilities-exported learner HTML with tiered pedagogic figures for offline self-study. v1.1.1 enforces DOM placement so figures never sit inside activity headers.
workflows.artifacts: Rendered learner HTML (Utilities export), image file artefacts, optional visual opportunity JSON
workflows.scopeAndConstraints: Presentation augmentation only — no LD redesign, no renderer changes, no base64 in analysis/generation prompts. Respect Sprint 31 activity order and Sprint 36 figure accommodation CSS.

steps.title: Analyse pedagogic visual opportunities
steps.notes: Tiered JSON opportunities; placement hints must align with Step 3 embed HARD RULES.

steps.title: Generate pedagogic figure images
steps.notes: File artefacts only; link each image to opportunity anchor for Step 3 embed.

steps.title: Embed pedagogic figures into learner HTML
steps.notes: v1.1.1 placement contract — figures as block siblings after .util-activity-header, never inside flex header.

workflows.name: Visual Enhancement Utility (embed only) v1.1.1
workflows.description: Single-step augment: embed pedagogic figures into Utilities HTML. Same v1.1.1 placement contract as the 3-step utility Step 3 / author Step 1 embed pass.
workflows.artifacts: Rendered learner HTML, figure image artefacts with alt/caption
workflows.scopeAndConstraints: Embed step only. Figures must not be placed inside .util-activity-header or .util-badge-row.

steps.title: Embed pedagogic figures into learner HTML
steps.notes: Step 1 in run UI. v1.1.1 header placement fix.
